changes: Replaced item:any with Doc<'feedItems'> type from convex dataModel
Replaced hardcoded colors with theme tokens (colors.background, colors.muted, colors.border)
Replaced hardcoded spacing with theme tokens (spacing.lg, spacing.md, spacing.xs)
Replaced hardcoded borderRadius with theme tokens (radius.lg)
Moved all dynamic theme values to inline styles using array syntax
StyleSheet now contains only layout props (flex, flexDirection, etc.)
Fixed unused variable (typography) to pass lint
